##RRUFFID=R160071
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=K(NaMn)CaNa_3_AlMn_13_(PO_4_)_12_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Nancy Pegmatite, Chacabuco Dept, San Luis, Argentina
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Thomas A. Loomis
##DESCRIPTION=Dark green massive, associated with dark brown bobfergusonite (R160069)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R160071
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(K_0.61_Pb_0.32_)(Na_1.00_Mn_1.00_)(Ca_0.33_Ba_0.18_)Na_2.98_Al_0.94_(Mn_6.84_Fe^2+^_5.41_Mg_0.82_)(PO_4_)_12_(OH)_2_ 
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
